title: Complete ARCHITECTURE.md directory structure
description: The directory structure section (lines 121-155) is missing many files that exist in the codebase. Add: runtime/embed.js, runtime/vad.js, runtime/profiler.js, runtime/latency-log.js, runtime/adapters/, store/, tunnel.js, cli/setup.js, cli/browser.js, server/cert.js, server/httpsServer.js, server/middleware.js. This closes architecture gaps for undocumented modules.
